# site-audit-log.md
# Ryan Realty — Optimization Session History
# Written by Claude Code at the end of every automated session.
# Human: do not edit manually. Review PRs and merge them — this file updates itself.

---

## How to read this file

Each session entry contains:
- What the pre-session metrics showed
- What new research revealed (current best practices)
- What was changed and in which files
- What metrics to watch for 7 days post-merge
- What is queued for the next session

Scroll to the bottom for the most recent session.
